summary: Pagination feature (Voir plus / Load more) fully tested and working. Backend: 15/15 tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements verified. GET /api/appointments/ correctly supports skip/limit/time_filter params. Dashboard shows 'À venir' and 'Passés' tabs with correct totals (49/71). 'Voir plus' button appears when has_more=true and disappears when all items loaded. Counter shows 'X sur N engagements' format.

backend: test_upcoming_filter_returns_paginated_response - Response has items, total, has_more, skip, limit fields
test_past_filter_returns_paginated_response - Past filter returns correct paginated structure
test_pagination_no_overlap - skip=0&limit=2 and skip=2&limit=2 return different items
test_upcoming_sorted_ascending - Upcoming sorted by start_datetime ascending (nearest first)
test_past_sorted_descending - Past sorted by start_datetime descending (most recent first)
test_upcoming_total_count - Upcoming total count verified (49 appointments)
test_past_total_count - Past total count verified (71 appointments)
test_load_more_upcoming_flow - Full load more flow: loaded all 49 items in 3 pages, no duplicates
test_load_more_past_flow - Second page loads without overlap
test_empty_result_when_skip_exceeds_total - skip=1000 returns empty items, has_more=false
test_no_time_filter_returns_all - No filter returns upcoming+past total
frontend: Dashboard loads with 'À venir' and 'Passés' tabs
Tabs show correct totals: 'À venir 49' and 'Passés 71'
'Voir plus' button disappears when all items loaded
No page refresh or scroll reset when loading more
Past tab also has 'Voir plus' with '20 sur 71 engagements'
All 49 appointment cards visible after loading all

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 120 appointments (49 upcoming, 71 past)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pagination feature (Voir plus) fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) GET /api/appointments/ supports skip, limit, time_filter params, (2) time_filter=upcoming returns future appointments sorted ascending, (3) time_filter=past returns past appointments sorted descending (most recent first), (4) Response includes items, total, skip, limit, has_more fields, (5) has_more=true when skip+limit < total, (6) Frontend OrganizerDashboard makes parallel API calls for upcoming and past on mount with limit=20, (7) 'Voir plus' button appears at bottom of each tab when has_more=true, (8) Counter shows 'X sur N engagements' format, (9) Button disappears when all items loaded. Test user testuser_audit@nlyt.app has 49 upcoming and 71 past appointments.
